privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy - How We Protect Your Data
privacyPolicy.description: Read Giant Whale Network's privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, store and protect your personal information. GDPR compliant data handling for our social media management platform.
privacyPolicy.keywords: privacy policy, data protection, personal information, GDPR compliance, data security, user privacy, Giant Whale Network

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service - User Agreement & Guidelines
termsOfService.description: Review Giant Whale Network's terms of service covering user rights, content guidelines, payment terms, and platform usage rules for our social media management service.
termsOfService.keywords: terms of service, user agreement, platform rules, content guidelines, payment terms, Giant Whale Network terms

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Guide - Remove Your Account & Data
dataDeletion.description: Step-by-step instructions to delete your Giant Whale Network account and personal data. Learn about data retention policies and submit data removal requests.
dataDeletion.keywords: data deletion, account removal, privacy rights, data erasure, delete account, right to be forgotten, Giant Whale Network

dataProtection.title: Data Protection Agreement - GDPR & Compliance
dataProtection.description: Giant Whale Network's data protection agreement outlines GDPR-compliant data processing standards, security measures, and your rights regarding personal data.
dataProtection.keywords: data protection, GDPR compliance, data processing, data security, privacy rights, data controller, Giant Whale Network

extensionPrivacy.title: Browser Extension Privacy - Data Usage & Permissions
extensionPrivacy.description: Understand how the Giant Whale Network browser extension handles your data. Learn about permissions, data collection practices, and security measures for our Chrome extension.
extensionPrivacy.keywords: extension privacy, browser extension, Chrome extension, data permissions, extension data collection, Giant Whale Network extension
